# IP-012: Same-file methods — Safe.Open stays silent (Sink declared first)
lang: go
file: IP-012-safe.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

type Safe struct{}
type Sink struct{}

// Opposite Open order from the vulnerable sibling.
func (s *Sink) Open(value string) {
	os.Open(value)
}

func (s *Safe) Open(value string) {
	_ = value
}

func (s *Safe) Handle(r *http.Request) {
	path := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
	s.Open(path)
}
